results.title: Global Data Scientist – Marketing Measurement and Optimization at McCormick & Company - United States Remote
highlights:
Global Data Scientist – Marketing Measurement and Optimization at McCormick & Company - United States Remote
...
# Global Data Scientist – Marketing Measurement and Optimization
...
Maryland – Remote
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Lead the design and implementation of next-gen media measurement and optimization capabilities, integrating marketing mix, long term brand equity measurement, in-flight measurement (e.g., lift studies, A/B testing), pre-market factors that affect media (e.g., creative testing) • Develop media-driven volume forecasting tools to integrate into McCormick’s demand forecasting platform • Drive and leverage external connections to find new and improved tools and approaches to bring into McCormick • Partner with vendors used for outsourced models, serving as lead consultant on technical methodology alignment integration with new capabilities • Develop training content that enables business partners to use marketing optimization capabilities more effectively
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Engineering or Data Analytics/Science, or closely related field • 4+ years’ experience in data science, with media analytics exposure a plus • Demonstrated sound understanding of concepts, principles and practices in Marketing and Sales • Demonstrated skills and results in analyzing complex datasets, generating insights and building robust statistical models • Demonstrated ability to connect the dots between complex data/analytics and business understanding • Proficiency with building dashboards for business users using data visualization software (Power BI preferred) • Expertise in SQL and Python coding • Demonstrated experience with building data models, machine learning & AI • Comfortable working with structured and unstructured data sources, e.g. syndicated data • Proven project leadership experience with demonstrated success in balancing multiple projects in a fast-paced environment; foresees and addresses issues before they become significant obstacles • Strong technical curiosity, a passion for problem solving and the ability to uncover richness of analytic insight that translates to business opportunity • Demonstrated agile learning skills; ability to learn new technology, skills & tools quickly and easily • Ability to synthesize analytic learnings and translate into compelling stories for a business audience • Effective at building collaborative, cross functional and cross-geography partnerships • Excellent written communication and presentation skills • Ability to travel internationally, as needed (0-5%) • Strong personal leadership, including attention to detail, quality of work and bias toward action • CPG or Food/Bev experience (preferred) • Understanding of the business and technical aspects of Marketing Mix Modeling, Media Effectiveness Testing tools (Lift, A/B, etc.), Creative Testing, and proficiency for the evolution of and other tools in the Media Effectiveness Space (preferred)
...

results.title: Principal Data Scientist- Global Marketing Measurement & Optimization | Jobflarely
highlights:
Principal Data Scientist- Global Marketing Measurement & Optimization | Jobflarely
...
# Principal Data Scientist- Global Marketing Measurement & Optimization
...
This Principal Data Scientist, Global Marketing Measurement and Optimization, will be responsible for bringing the data science expertise that is needed to lead a range of projects to drive better understanding of short- and long-term marketing effectiveness, including the next generation of technical modeling that powers McCormick’s marketing measurement and optimization program. McCormick can drive unprecedented brand growth by learning how to better measure all aspects of marketing/media design and execution and bringing these different analytics together to provide a holistic view on the drivers of short- and long-term growth and build predictive models to enable better decision making. The role is designed to give McCormick the data and analytical engine to make this happen.
...
- Lead the design and implementation of next-gen media measurement and optimization capabilities, integrating marketing mix, long term brand equity measurement, in-flight measurement (e.g., lift studies, A/B testing), pre-market factors that affect media (e.g., creative testing)
...
- Develop media-driven volume forecasting tools to integrate into McCormick’s demand forecasting platform
...
- Drive and leverage external connections to find new and improved tools and approaches to bring into McCormick
...
- Partner with vendors used for outsourced models, serving as lead consultant on technical methodology alignment integration with new capabilities
...
- 8+ years’ experience in data science, with media analytics expertise
...
- Understanding of the business and technical aspects of Marketing Mix Modeling, Media Effectiveness Testing tools (Lift, A/B, etc.), Creative Testing, and proficiency for the evolution of and other tools in the Media Effectiveness Space
...
- Demonstrated skills and results in analyzing complex datasets, generating insights and building robust statistical models
...
- Expertise in SQL and Python coding
...
- Demonstrated experience with building data models, machine learning & AI

results.title: Jillian Shea
highlights:
Principal Data Scientist, Global Marketing & Sales Analytics
...
Principal Data Scientist at [McCormick & Company](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mccormick)
...
I love solving problems, and using data to do this is my specialty. With over ten years of experience working with data, I have a passion for making data useful, interesting, and fun for others. As a data scientist, I like going above and beyond building models and analyzing data to make sure the information is useful and actionable for solving business problems. In my previous role in operations research, I successfully used data and modeling to improve processes and make them more efficient. Whether it's through data mining, collaborating, or researching, I enjoy learning, and I seek to learn something new on a daily basis. I also enjoy sharing information and teaching what I've learned so that others can benefit from my natural curiosity. Competencies: Data Science, Machine Learning, Data Mining, Statistical Modeling, Cassandra / Spark, Python, R, SQL

highlights:

### [McCormick & Company](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mccormick)
...
#### Associate Data Scientist (Current)
...
1.Built an AI agent that automatically monitors any topic, generates intelligent summaries (text, PDF, and audio), and delivers personalized email digests across the organization using Azure OpenAI, Search API, Logic Apps, and prompt engineering. 2.Automated color counting in PDFs for procurement using PyTesseract, OpenCV, and GPT-4o Fully replaced manual color estimation with an AI-powered pipeline, enabling data-driven price negotiations 3.Designed and deployed a prompt optimization backend service for enterprise chatbot enhancement, implementing FastAPI endpoints with streaming/non-streaming responses, MongoDB audit logging, and multi-model support, plus comprehensive Postman test collections for API validation, enabling 13K+ employees to create effective AI prompts following GPT-5 best practices 4.Implemented AI data analyst with Azure OpenAI Code Interpreter integration, enabling automated Python-based CSV/XLSX analysis with real-time chart generation and multi-stage file lifecycle management across cloud storage systems. Show less
...
1.Developing a scalable backend for a multimodal chatbot (text + image) using FastAPI, MongoDB, Azure OpenAI, and Gemini, managing chat and image history, and deploying via Azure Web Apps for company-wide access to an internal AI assistant. 2.Built a sentiment analysis tool using Hugging Face, TextBlob, and Azure Sentiment to analyze sentence-level feedback, and deployed it with Streamlit for the IR team via an interactive dashboard. 3.Developed an OCR-based document labeling pipeline using Azure OCR, Tesseract, Gemini models, and Azure OpenAI, improving label extraction accuracy for the Nutrition team. 4.Created a multilingual translation platform to convert emails, audio, and video into 10+ languages using Azure OpenAI and Streamlit, enhancing internal communication efficiency. Show less
...
1.Developed ETL processes on Azure Synapse using Gen 2 DL for data storage, aggregating and preprocessing data for vinegar price prediction. Created a forecasting algorithm and integrated Power BI for reporting, providing stakeholders with actionable insights for strategic decisions. 2.Led translation efforts , saving $15K by developing a POC with Gemini, GPT-4, Python, and Azure AI, which significantly reduced document translation time. 3.Developed a Azure Synapse solution utilizing Azure OpenAI for a RAG-based HR chatbot, enhancing response tracking and optimizing token management. 4.Developed an Azure Synapse pipeline to automate PDF text extraction using Azure Document Intelligence Studio and process translation using GPT-4,Gemini 1.5 Flash, Mistral 7B streamlining document handling and improving multilingual support for food labels. 5.Developing an AI agent using Travily, Gemini, GPT-4,SerpAPI and LangChain to autonomously search the web, extract relevant information from URLs, and parse content. 6.Developed a LLM-based classification system on Azure Synpase to categorize materials for Purpose-Led Performance (PLP), enhancing Scope 3 emissions measurement capabilities. 7..Set up a Power Automate flow to fetch image attachments from Power BI reports, move them to SharePoint and then to Blob storage, and pass the images to GPT-4 for in-depth analysis, summary, and to help buyers understand technical analysis charts in a simple fashion. 8.Developed a chatbot using LangChain, Pandas agent, and Streamlit for interactive CSV data analysis, integrating Azure OpenAI for enhanced query processing and response generation helping finance team analyze data quickly. 9.Led migration of financial models to production, implementing gen-ai summaries, data flows, and Power Query parameters to streamline processes and enhance analysis efficiency Show less

This past summer I had an incredible work experience as a R&D Data Science Assistant at McCormick & Company . Over the course of a 9-week project, I developed an application using a Neo4j graph database to extract flavor insights from a highly relational, large-scale data set. I am proud that the project was deemed a success, and I'm excited about the possibility of contributing further as it progresses. I want to extend my thanks to the R&D team members who welcomed me and generously provided their mentorship throughout this journey, especially Jeff Moore , Pascal Sigel and Katie Beaver .

results.title: Marketing Analyst – SmithCareers
highlights:
McCormick & Co.
...
# Marketing Analyst
...
You may know McCormick as a leader in herbs, spices, seasonings, and condiments – and we’re only getting started. At McCormick, we’re always looking for new people to bring their unique flavor to our team.
...
We are looking to hire an Entry Level Marketing Analyst (Condiments & Sauces) in a Hybrid (50/50) capacity at our Global Headquarters in Hunt Valley, Maryland.
...
Job Overview:
...
McCormick is seeking a Marketing Analyst to join the Condiments & Sauces Marketing Team reporting to the Sr. Product Manager of Asian Brands (Thai Kitchen/Simply Asia). This role is ideal for recent graduates or early-career professionals who are passionate about data-driven decision making and eager to develop their skills in marketing analytics, business performance reporting, consumer insights, and project management. The Marketing Analyst will play a key role in understanding business drivers, analyzing consumer data, and evaluating competitive landscapes to help shape McCormick’s marketing strategies and business decisions.
...
Key Responsibilities:
...
- Analyze key business drivers, including sales trends, competitive performance, and consumer behavior to identify opportunities and risks.
- Monitor product launches, pricing strategies, and marketing campaigns.
- Support the development of actionable recommendations to optimize business outcomes and marketing strategies.
- Support the creation of reports and dashboards to visualize marketing performance and share insights with the team.
- Conduct research on market trends, consumer behavior, and competitor activities to support marketing initiatives.
- Work closely with marketing, sales, and data teams to ensure alignment on goals and priorities.
- Assist in maintaining data accuracy and integrity by ensuring proper documentation and organization of datasets.
...
Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Data Analytics, or a related field.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a keen attention to detail.
- Proficiency with MS Excel, Power Point, and Word.
- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.
- Eagerness to learn and grow in a data-driven marketing environment.
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team setting.
...
Preferred Qualifications:
...
- Internship or academic project experience in data analysis, marketing, or business performance reporting.
- CPG environment experience.
- Basic understanding of data storytelling.
- Experience utilizing data: POS, Retailer Specific, Panel and other consumer-based data providers.

Activity: Will Conway liked
...
From next week I'll level up within PA to managing consultant. It's been fun, interesting and genuinely challenging building out our portfolio of physics work, from quantum computing and sensing, through applications of particle accelerators, metamaterials and even some non-linear optics - all to enable new and enhanced capabilities for our clients, particularly those in the defence sector who spend so much time and energy trying to keep the UK safe. The plan is to make the range both broader and deeper in 2024!
...
After nearly four terrific years leading global R&D at McCormick & Co., Inc., I am excited to share news that I have been selected as the next Dean, College of Agriculture and Natural Resources (CANR) at the University of Delaware starting April 1, 2024. I look forward to working with University President Dennis Assanis and Provost Laura Carlson, the campus community, and our stakeholders beyond to advance CANR’s mission of teaching, research and extension and continue to elevate UD’s reputation as a land-grant institution. https://lnkd.in/ekEj3esd To my McCormick R&D leadership team and my global R&D family, you are sensational in all you do. Over the past four years we successfully navigated our way through a global pandemic, economic upheaval and so much more using depth of science, breadth of experience, and commitment to a world-class company that is #McCormick , thank you!

# Data Scientist (100%)
...
## Drive innovation in machine learning and AI, from research to deployment, creating scalable intelligent systems that power the next generation of scientific discovery.
...
Are you passionate about turning complex data into intelligent, production-ready solutions while supporting the future of open-access science? We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our team and help design, develop, and deploy advanced machine learning solutions that power intelligent, data-driven products. This role focuses on NLP, recommender systems, and agentic LLM workflows, turning complex business challenges into scalable and impactful analytical solutions.
...
This is an opportunity to work at the forefront of machine learning and AI, contributing to innovative systems that leverage state-of-the-art research in practical applications.
...
Core Responsibilities
...
Design, develop, and evaluate machine learning and statistical models, with a focus on NLP, recommender systems, and LLM-based solutions.
...
Translate business problems into data-driven approaches and scalable analytical solutions.
...
Perform data exploration, preprocessing, and feature engineering to ensure high-quality inputs for modeling.
...
Develop, optimize, and benchmark models using appropriate metrics and validation strategies.
...
Build and experiment with LLM-powered systems, including agentic workflows and RAG.
...
Investigate, reproduce, and compare research prototypes and state-of-the-art methods.
...
Collaborate with engineering teams to support the integration of models into production.
...
Monitor and analyze model performance and iterate to improve accuracy and robustness.
...
Bachelor’s degree/ Master's degree in Computer Science or related.
...
2-5 years of experience as a Data Scientist.
...
2–5 years of experience in Python (including complex applications), Machine Learning, and LLMs.
...
Strong background in data science, statistics, and analytical problem-solving.
...
Intermediate proficiency in FastAPI, Celery, and Keycloak.
...
Intermediate proficiency in PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Hugging Face.
...
Proficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP), including tokenization and named entity recognition (NER).
...
In-depth understanding of Artificial Intelligence principles.

Strong working knowledge of Microsoft O365 tools.

Sunnyvale, CAHybridSeniorML / AI

Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.
...
About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.

...
- Prior Experience in building GenAI, DL, Vision-based models.
...
- Strong foundation in classical ML, deep learning, and modern architectures — CNNs, Transformers, and domain-specific variants
...
Mandatory Skills: Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Deep-learning, Python, GenAI Additional Qualifications: Good to have experience in areas such as LLM Optimization.

results.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | CareerSync
highlights:
# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
...
AI Strategy & Vision: Partner with the CEO, CTO, CIO, and business unit heads to define IDC's multi-year AI roadmap—spanning generative AI, agentic systems, predictive analytics, and AI-native product development. Technical Leadership: Architect and oversee IDC's AI platform and infrastructure, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment with enterprise data strategy. Product Delivery: Develop and execute IDC’s approach to agentic AI technology, thereby delivering the centerpiece of IDC Quanta, our cross-channel technology intelligence layer. Team Building: Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class AI team spanning ML engineers, data scientists, AI product managers, and MLOps specialists. Stakeholder Alignment: Translate complex AI capabilities into clear business value for executives and department heads; maintain transparent goals and resource planning. Ecosystem & Partnerships: Evaluate and manage AI technology partnerships, vendor relationships, and open-source contributions to accelerate IDC's AI capabilities. What You Bring
...
PhD. or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Statistics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience).
...
7+ years of experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or data science—with at least 3 years in senior technical leadership roles.
...
and platforms that generated measurable
...
impact (revenue growth, cost reduction, or product differentiation).
...
Deep expertise in modern AI/ML and agentic/generative systems design.
...
Hands-on fluency with generative AI technologies: LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen).
...
Strong engineering foundation: Python, SQL, cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML), and modern MLOps practices (CI/CD, model monitoring, feature stores).
...
Tech industries.
...
Familiarity with knowledge graphs, semantic search, or AI applications in content and market research workflows.
...
Experience with responsible AI frameworks, model governance, and AI regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF).
...
Track record of building AI developer platforms or shared ML infrastructure used by multiple product teams.

results.title: Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart
...
# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.
...
- Build and deploy production ML systems end-to-end: data pipelines, feature stores, model training, serving layers, monitoring, and feedback loops at scale
...
- Provide technical visionand lead advanced development in agentic AI, reinforcement learning, and simulation.
...
- Architect and deploy large-scale AI systems and autonomous AI agents — conversational assistants, predictive agents with tool-calling, and multi-agent orchestration systems using LangChain, Pydantic AI, and RAG patterns
...
